## Checklist

- [ ] I ran local checks (`scripts/ci/verify.sh` or equivalent).
- [ ] I added/updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I updated documentation (README/docs/CHANGELOG) when needed.
- [ ] I updated API contracts if API schema changed.

- [ ] I verified no secrets were introduced.
